_comment: Update pointer for the 'Update Library' flow. A device fetches this file, compares latest.libraryVersion to its installed catalog, and (if newer) downloads latest.url (the catalog manifest), then fetches each board listed in manifest.boards in order, validates them, and loads them via loadLibrary(boards, { libraryVersion }).

latest.notes: Major: MagicPanel split into two vendor boards. The original board is renamed IA MagicPanel and its command id changes mp.mode -> iamp.mode (BREAKING for stored selections of that command; the T{mode} wire string is unchanged). Adds PD MagicPanel (Printed Droid Magic Panel 32 Wireless): 20 commands covering the full pattern list (0-68, 80, 97-99, optional :duration), brightness / speed / preset color / custom RGB / transitions, scroll & bounce text with savable slots, font, playlists, startup pattern, operating mode, settings save/load, and panel on/off. IA precedes PD in the manifest so the pattern codes both boards share still resolve to IA on parse.
